narrative:
Reynoldsburg 3-D (precinct in Licking County) has 1,808 registered voters, with 62.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.9 percentage points.
